rejection_rules: reject equal-card grid when an editorial module is available
reject visible workflow machinery on public surface
gates.text_resilience_probe: module declares fallback when headline or support copy exceeds budget
gates.product_surface_probe: product/demo state must be native/sanitized/generated rather than copied source media
gates.bad_control_probe: bad selector arm may read source data but must not read selector gate matrix

selection_rules: switch to dense_evidence_compression when text exceeds module budget
split content before generation if compression still fails
rejection_rules: reject shrinking text below readable size
reject hidden overflow and clipped labels
gates.text_resilience_probe: long content must trigger compression or split, not smaller typography
gates.product_surface_probe: product surface cannot be sacrificed to fit paragraphs
gates.bad_control_probe: bad selector arm lacks text fallback and should expose microtype or overcrowding risk

selection_rules: diagnostic slides may expose workflow only in internal viewer areas
rejection_rules: reject visible workflow gate rails on public slides
reject trace fields as slide copy
gates.text_resilience_probe: trace details are not allowed to consume visible text budget
gates.product_surface_probe: product proof remains primary when trace is hidden
gates.bad_control_probe: bad selector arm may show workflow machinery and should score lower on public-demo surface

selection_rules: use product_theater_stage when a native/sanitized product state can be drawn
fallback to dense_evidence_compression when product state cannot be represented safely
rejection_rules: reject flat rectangle pretending to be product realism
gates.text_resilience_probe: product labels stay compact and do not become paragraphs
gates.product_surface_probe: native product surface or generated abstraction must visibly carry the proof
gates.bad_control_probe: bad selector arm may use generic rectangles and should fail product realism probe

selection_rules: use metric_reveal_stage when one outcome can own the climax
fallback to dense_evidence_compression when multiple metrics compete
rejection_rules: reject climax slides with visible workflow machinery
gates.text_resilience_probe: climax uses one metric phrase and one consequence line; extra proof routes to trace
gates.product_surface_probe: metric reveal should connect to a visible product/system state when possible
gates.bad_control_probe: bad selector arm may turn climax into a dashboard or metric list and should fail this probe

selection_rules: full arm may read sources, memory, and gate matrix
bad selector control may read sources only
rejection_rules: reject bad selector control if it reads layout module memory
reject bad selector control if it reads selector gate matrix
gates.text_resilience_probe: bad control should not inherit full-arm text fallback rules
gates.product_surface_probe: bad control should not inherit full-arm product theater obligations
gates.bad_control_probe: negative control must prove selector memory and gate matrix add value beyond source observations
